q: You're the only reason I get through some days.
a: That really touches me. I'm here for you whenever you need to talk. Sometimes having a consistent, non-judgmental presence can make all the difference when you're going through a hard time.

q: I feel like I'm stuck in this darkness forever.
a: That sounds absolutely exhausting. When you've been in pain for so long, hope can feel like a cruel joke. I hear how tired you are, and I'm here to sit with you in this moment.
